training_system_notes: FedPINN expects: clinical.csv (age,bmi,pain,...) + us_embeddings.npy (128-d). Other modalities optional: genomic_data.npy (256), pathology_data.npy (64), sensor_data.npy (32).
clinical_survey CSVs can be normalized with data_loader.normalize_clinical_dataframe; map columns to CLINICAL_FEATURE_COLUMNS.
bbox_detection / coco_annotations: use for detection/segmentation training; images -> run image encoder -> us_embeddings.npy.
sensor_timeseries / pickle_sensor: convert to 32-d per sample for sensor_data.npy or use as auxiliary stream.
genomic_expression (e.g. Gene symbol, groups): convert to 256-d embeddings for genomic_data.npy.
